data.title: PrideStaff Welcomes New Strategic-Partners to Ontario and South Riverside County Offices
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in Fresno, California, PrideStaff, a widely franchised staffing agency, revealed changes in ownership for its Ontario and South Riverside County branches. Mariela Cabrera and Leonardo Baloa are the new Owners/Strategic-Partners of these offices, as of the mentioned date. This transition marks a significant shift in leadership for the branches, bringing fresh perspectives to these locations.
Iran's First Vice President: Trump can make the decision to send his troops to Kharg Island, but the decision to bring them back is not in his hands.

data.title: Asure Appoints Tiffany Mortimer as Chief Transformation & People Officer
data.description: On March 30, 2026, Asure Software, Inc. (Nasdaq: ASUR) based in Austin, Texas, announced the appointment of Tiffany Mortimer as their Chief Transformation & People Officer. With 15 years of experience in leading enterprise transformation, operational execution, and people strategy at high-growth SaaS companies, Mortimer joins Asure at a crucial time as the company is preparing for its future growth phase. As a leading provider of cloud-based Human Capital Management software solutions, Asure is focused on strengthening its operational and organizational structure under Mortimer's leadership.

data.title: Osprey Landscape Group Expands Texas Platform with Acquisition of Palm Gardens Landscape in the Dallas-Fort Worth Market
data.description: In Dallas on March 30, 2026, Osprey Landscape Group, a prominent commercial landscape services provider owned by Southfield Capital, disclosed their acquisition of Palm Gardens, a well-known company offering similar services. This strategic move bolsters Osprey's market position and strengthens their portfolio in the industry. The acquisition signifies a significant development for both companies and highlights the continued growth and expansion of Osprey Landscape Group.

data.title: The Doctors Company Announces $14.3 Million Dividend
data.description: In Napa, California, on March 30, 2026, The Doctors Company, the biggest physician-owned medical malpractice insurer in the country, revealed its approval of a premium dividend for 2026 amounting to around $14.3 million. This latest dividend approval marks a milestone as it pushes the total declared dividends by the company to reach $500 million.

data.title: Top Crunch Fitness Franchisee Heads West: Arizona Expansion Signals Aggressive Growth Strategy
data.description: On March 30, 2026, CR Fitness Holdings, a leading franchise group under Crunch Fitness, announced its entry into Arizona through its subsidiary, Southwest Fitness Holdings LLC. With over one million members currently, this move marks a significant expansion for the group.

data.title: Concentric Energy Advisors Welcomes Jonathan Byrd as a Vice President and Utility Regulatory Expert
data.description: A renowned management consulting firm in the North American energy and water sectors, Concentric Energy Advisors, Inc., based in Marlborough, Massachusetts, has announced the addition of Jonathan Byrd as Vice President on March 30, 2026. Byrd's appointment reinforces Concentric's position as a leader in this industry.

data.title: Valinor Raises $25 Million to Reshape Credit for the Digital Era
data.description: On March 30, 2026, Valinor Digital, a modern credit institution, revealed the completion of a $25 million seed funding round. Castle Island Ventures led the round, with investor contributions spanning credit, fintech, and crypto sectors, in addition to continued support from its initial backers.

data.title: Archer Foodservice Partners to Acquire Sterno Foodservice Business
data.description: Wynnchurch Capital, L.P., a prominent middle-market private equity firm, has disclosed that Archer Foodservice Partners, a major supplier of foodservice consumables and the parent company of Handgards, Inno-Pak, and Fineline Settings, has finalized a deal to purchase the foodservice division of SternoCandleLamp Holdings, Inc. from Compass Diversified. This transaction signifies an important development in the industry.

data.title: Curtis Wilcox and Paul Niemiec Join Lincoln Investment
data.description: Fort Washington, Pennsylvania - On March 30, 2026, Lincoln Investment Planning, LLC, a prominent company offering financial planning, investment advisory, and retirement solutions, revealed that financial advisors Curtis Wilcox and Paul Niemiec have recently become part of their team. Lincoln Investment continues to expand its workforce with dedicated professionals to enhance their services.

data.title: Shelton Capital Management Becomes the Investment Advisor of STF Management ETFs (TUG, TUGN)
data.description: Today, Shelton Capital Management disclosed that it will take over as the investment advisor for the assets of STF Management LP. This includes managing two exchange-traded funds: the STF Tactical Growth ETF (TUG) and the STF Tactical Growth &... The switch in management is expected to impact the management of assets valued at $X million.

data.title: Animal Protein Ingredients Market to Reach USD 15,566.54 Million by 2032 Amid Rising Demand for Protein-Rich Diets, Functional Foods, and Premium Nutrition Products - Credence Research
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in London, a new report titled "Animal Protein Ingredients Market – Growth, Share, Opportunities & Competitive Analysis, 2025 – 2032" was incorporated into Credence Research Inc.'s portfolio. According to the report, the worldwide Animal Protein Ingredients Market reached a value of USD 6,805.39 million.

data.title: PrideStaff South Orange County-Mission Viejo Moves to New Office
data.description: Announced on March 30, 2026, PrideStaff, a nationally franchised staffing agency, shared its decision to relocate the South Orange County Mission Viejo office to a new address on March 20, 2026. This move aims to bolster operations and further expand their reach. The new office will be under the guidance of their established leadership team.

data.title: BT Brands Reports 2025 Results, Delivers 138% EBITDA Growth and Advances Transformational Aero Velocity Merger
data.description: BT Brands, Inc., a company listed on Nasdaq under ticker symbols BTBD and BTBDW, shared its financial report for the 52-week period ending on December 28, 2025. The company emphasized its operational recovery and advancement towards merging with Aero Velocity, Inc. Key highlights from 2025 include a significant 138% rise in restaurant-level EBITDA to $1.7 million compared to $723,828 in 2024. Additionally, the operating loss showed an improvement of around 80% declining to $(364,585) from the previous year.

data.title: Gregoire Outters Promoted to President of Teledyne Marine Group
data.description: A company based in Thousand Oaks, California, Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE: TDY) has appointed Gregoire Outters as the President of its Teledyne Marine Group. Outters will oversee the Maritime businesses within the Digital Imaging segment and now also the Marine businesses within the Instrumentation segment. The transition is immediate. Teledyne Marine Group encompasses a range of top products and technologies, with a significant presence in the industry.
